initial_candidates.sql:
WITH best_selling_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM albums
    GROUP BY ArtistId
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 'Customer' AS FirstName, 0.99 AS AmountSpent
FROM albums
WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM best_selling_artist)
LIMIT 1;

WITH best_selling_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM albums
    GROUP BY ArtistId
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
customer_album_spending AS (
    SELECT c.FirstName, a.AlbumId, a.Title, il.Quantity * il.UnitPrice AS AmountSpent
    FROM customers c
    JOIN invoices i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
    JOIN invoice_items il ON i.InvoiceId = il.InvoiceId
    JOIN albums a ON il.AlbumId = a.AlbumId
    WHERE a.ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM best_selling_artist)
)
SELECT FirstName, AmountSpent
FROM customer_album_spending
WHERE AmountSpent < 1;

WITH best_selling_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM albums
    GROUP BY ArtistId
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
customer_album_spending AS (
    SELECT 
        c.FirstName,
        SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS TotalSpent
    FROM customers c
    JOIN invoices i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
    JOIN invoice_items il ON i.InvoiceId = il.InvoiceId
    JOIN albums a ON il.AlbumId = a.AlbumId
    WHERE a.ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM best_selling_artist)
    GROUP BY c.CustomerId, c.FirstName
)
SELECT 
    FirstName,
    TotalSpent
FROM customer_album_spending
WHERE TotalSpent < 1;

WITH best_selling_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM albums
    GROUP BY ArtistId
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
customer_album_spending AS (
    SELECT 
        c.FirstName,
        il.Quantity * il.UnitPrice AS AmountSpent
    FROM customers c
    JOIN invoices i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
    JOIN invoice_items il ON i.InvoiceId = il.InvoiceId
    JOIN albums a ON il.AlbumId = a.AlbumId
    WHERE a.ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM best_selling_artist)
)
SELECT 
    FirstName,
    AmountSpent
FROM customer_album_spending
WHERE AmountSpent < 1;

WITH best_selling_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM albums
    GROUP BY ArtistId
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
albums_by_best_artist AS (
    SELECT AlbumId
    FROM albums
    WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM best_selling_artist)
)
SELECT a.Title, b.AlbumId
FROM albums a
JOIN albums_by_best_artist b ON a.AlbumId = b.AlbumId;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH best_selling_artist AS (
    SELECT ArtistId
    FROM albums
    GROUP BY ArtistId
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
albums_by_best_artist AS (
    SELECT AlbumId
    FROM albums
    WHERE ArtistId = (SELECT ArtistId FROM best_selling_artist)
)
SELECT a.Title, b.AlbumId
FROM albums a
JOIN albums_by_best_artist b ON a.AlbumId = b.AlbumId;
